artifact_summary: Screenshot of a SCADA system showing a Level PID loop configuration faceplate with control parameters.
artifact_blurb: A screenshot of a Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) system interface displaying a Level PID loop configuration faceplate. The view details specific control parameters including process variable limits, control action settings, and deadband values for a designated loop ID.
